title: reference record
description: Record a fetched external source (literature harness). arxiv/web sources require a cached artifact_ref (invariant fetched_reference_cached). record_id = reference_id. QUEST ISOLATION: quest_id is REQUIRED and non-null — every reference is owned by exactly one quest; cross-quest/global references are not allowed (invariant reference_quest_owned).

quest_id.description: owning quest; REQUIRED — no cross-quest/global references
